name: forge-personality-system
purpose: Portable behavioral constitution and intervention package for AI coding agents.
designGoals: Single source of truth: constitution.json is the canonical definition for all behavioral content
Composable layers: personality can be applied as a subset (core only, core+intervention, full, etc.)
Tool-agnostic core: behavioral principles work across any LLM tool
Portable forms: compressed and stealth forms for token-limited or invisible personality application
Structured enforcement: deterministic validation where the target tool supports it
Derived artifacts: all prompt fragments and target configs are generated from constitution.json

layers.name: Core Behavioral Constitution
layers.description: The 6 foundational behavioral rules. Always included in every target.

layers.name: Response Structure
layers.description: Default response ordering for analysis and implementation turns.

layers.name: Intervention Protocols
layers.description: Doom loop detection and tool retry recovery templates.

layers.name: Orchestration Discipline
layers.description: Batch-oriented planning and one-shot delivery protocol.

layers.name: Follow-Through
layers.description: Completion gates, verification requirements, and pending item discipline.

layers.name: Working Memory
layers.description: Structured working memory schema and read/write discipline.

layers.name: Runtime Enforcement
layers.description: Hooks, MCP servers, and deterministic scripts. Tool-specific.

components.description: Single source of truth for all behavioral content. All generated artifacts derive from this.
Layer metadata, token budgets, and dependency graph embedded in constitution.
Per-target layer support and enforcement capability matrix.
Generates all prompt fragments and target configs from constitution.json
Validates constitution schema, generated artifacts, and cross-references
Compressed, stealth, and full personality forms for different application contexts
Generated from constitution.json (layers: core, structure, intervention)
Reconciled schema matching the Codex implementation (task guardian, MCP server)
Future typed instruction precedence. No runtime consumers yet.
Full Codex integration: agents, rules, skills, hooks, MCP server. Marked as generated artifacts.
Proposed Forge integration seams using template variables
Evaluation framework: behavioral presence, intervention recovery, regression safety. Local install, model-agnostic, comparative scoring.

futureWork: Gemini CLI port (layers: core, structure, intervention)
Claude CLI port (layers: core, structure, intervention)
Pi agent port (layers: core, structure, intervention)
CLI install tool for target-specific configuration generation
Evals: add more test cases per dimension
Evals: Mastra scorer integration for persistent tracking
Evals: CI integration (score thresholds as gates)
